# robots.txt for foodtracks.io
# Static fallback — the canonical version is generated by Next.js via app/robots.ts

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /settings/
Disallow: /verify-email/
Disallow: /login/
Disallow: /register/

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Allow: /fr/blog/
Allow: /en/blog/
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /dashboard/

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /
Allow: /fr/blog/
Allow: /en/blog/
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /dashboard/

Allow: /

Disallow: /dashboard/
